reasoning: The candidate tile (outdoor_wall_broken_v00) is a warm sandy/beige broken-stone texture applied to a section of the scene floor. (4) Not native aesthetic — the sandy broken-stone look belongs to an outdoor ruins/desert context, not the dungeon interior established by the rest of the scene. Foreground sprite readability on this tile would be degraded due to the brightness lift and textural busyness.
